kits.kit_name_canonical: Galesworn Drifter of the Open Field
kits.kit_identity_narrative: A swift, dexterous melee fighter who rides the wind's momentum across broad fronts, delivering a relentless flat tempo of strikes that neither peaks nor falters. True to the Wardens' open-clash doctrine, this fighter closes distance without cover, letting the gale's wide sweep carry the assault line forward.

A swift skirmisher who moves through the front line with rapier-point precision, drawing holy light across wide arcs to pierce through clustered foes. Where the Wardens' broader surges crash, the Gleam-dancer threads bright corridors between them, keeping the assault line sharp and the enemy's footing uncertain.

Where the Wardens' frontal surge meets shadow-work, this caster-arcane fighter channels darkness through melee range, using INT-driven arcane casting to pierce gaps in the wide assault and collapse enemy formations from within their own lines. The shadow that runs thin elsewhere finds its edge here—a necessary counterpoint to the Wardens' open clash.

A front-line water-wielder who channels surging tidal force into broad, flat sweeps that hit wide rather than deep, keeping pace with the Gale and Tide Wardens' relentless push across open ground. Her INT-driven strikes read the flow of the clash and redirect it, turning the enemy line's own momentum into the next wave.

A heavily-armored melee fighter who channels raw physical force through oversized martial weapons, delivering devastating close-range strikes that rupture terrain and shatter enemy formations. Their relentless aggression and flat, overwhelming power output anchor the Stormbreak frontline, grinding through defensive positions via sheer kinetic impact.

Where the Stormbreak Earthen Vanguard's shockwaves crack the ground open, the Ironbreaker of Fengate drives into the breach with unrelenting STR-driven strikes, hammering at the same tempo whether the first blow lands or the thirtieth. No elemental charge, no ranged reach — just the flat, grinding force that keeps opponents pinned while the earth beneath them gives way.

A faith-driven melee combatant who reads seismic tremors through staff and stone, delivering crushing earth detonations at close range to rupture enemy formations. Their wisdom channels the faction's earth dominion into wide-sweeping ground fractures that grind advancing opponents into submission.

kits.kit_name_canonical: Gale Warden of the Rushing Shelf
kits.kit_identity_narrative: A wind-element close-quarters fighter who reads the breath of open terrain to time variable bursts of sweeping force, striking when the surge peaks and pulling back before the tide turns. Wisdom governs the rhythm of each advance — not caution, but the warden's trained sense of when the wind front is widest and the press hardest.

A lone melee fighter who moves in long silences and strikes with sudden, bone-deep force — no banner, no column, just the weight of a body trained to end things cleanly. Strength is the only credential carried.

A heavy-armed striker who drives crushing melee strikes into enemy formations, using variable-amplitude swings to rupture terrain and amplify shockwave propagation across the battlefield. Their martial discipline channels raw strength through deliberate proximity engagement, grinding opposing lines into submission through relentless earth-shaking impact.

A heavy-armed vanguard fighter who drives deep into enemy formations with a spiked halberd, using the weapon's leverage to rupture ground and create cascading tremors that destabilize entire ranks. Their strength lies in relentless forward momentum and the violent detonation of each impact point.

kits.kit_name_canonical: Gale Warden of the Open Field
kits.kit_identity_narrative: A mid-tempo melee fighter who reads the wind's shifting pressure to vary strike amplitude, converting wide-front surges into decisive close-range blows guided by WIS-driven battlefield awareness. Where others lean on shadow or precision threading, this warden holds the line in the open, letting the gale set the pace.

Where the Stormbreak Earthen Vanguard drives forward with brute shockwave pressure, this fighter reads subsurface fault lines through disciplined stillness, triggering variable-yield earth ruptures that buckle footing across the melee press. Wisdom governs the timing — each detonation chosen not for speed but for maximum ground denial when enemy ranks are densest.

A ranged striker who channels water-surge timing into rapid volleys across open ground, sustaining the Wardens' wide-front assault with dexterous bow-work that matches the faction's preference for exposed, high-tempo engagement. Where others might seek cover, this kit keeps pace with the sweeping advance, delivering piercing shots on the momentum of wind and tide.

kits.kit_name_canonical: Gale Warden of the Flat Rush
kits.kit_identity_narrative: A dexterous striker who rides the wind surge across mid-range ground, maintaining a relentless tempo without cresting into heavy blows — the sustained gust that never breaks, only pushes. True to the confederation's open-front doctrine, this fighter holds the line through speed and reach rather than force, keeping the assault wide and the pressure constant.

A shadow-attuned striker who holds position at mid-range, releasing slow-building pulses of darkness that detonate in sudden, high-amplitude bursts across grouped targets. Within the Chain-Strike Stormcallers, this combatant earns standing not through speed but through patience — letting shadow accumulate between strikes until the cascade cannot be denied.

kits.kit_name_canonical: Tide Warden of the Radiant Shore
kits.kit_identity_narrative: A mid-range fighter who reads the ebb and flow of the battle line, channeling holy light in variable pulses that crest and recede like surf — sometimes a broad cleansing surge, sometimes a focused beam that steadies the strike front. Wisdom governs every release; this Warden waits for the tide's turn before committing force.

kits.kit_name_canonical: the Earthbound Ascetic of Shattered Stone
kits.kit_identity_narrative: A faith-caster who channels earth-dominion through meditative discipline, delivering variable-tempo shockwaves that ripple across the mid-range battlefield and leave fractured ground in their wake. Their strikes blend the Vanguard's close-quarters aggression with the patient, deliberate tempo of eastern monastic combat tradition.

A ranged lightning striker who holds the far edge of the Warden battle line, loosing rapid flat volleys of crackling bolts across the open field to keep the surge front wide and unbroken. Where wind and water press forward, this dexterous shooter threads the sky above the melee with continuous arcing discharge, denying the enemy any pocket to regroup.

kits.kit_name_canonical: Galeshot Warden of the Open Front
kits.kit_identity_narrative: A ranged striker who holds the wide assault line with rapid, flat-arc volleys — dexterity-driven and relentless, threading kinetic pressure across the full breadth of the surge rather than concentrating fire on a single point. Where wind and tide set the front, this warden's output keeps it honest.

A patient, dexterous ranged combatant who holds distance and waits for enemy lines to compress before releasing a single arcing bolt that leaps and punishes in sudden, devastating sequence. Within the Chain-Strike Stormcallers' doctrine of gap-maintained attrition, this striker's low tempo and explosive output mark them as the fellowship's delayed-detonation instrument — rarely first to act, never last to matter.

kits.kit_name_canonical: Dusk Striker of the Hollow Reach
kits.kit_identity_narrative: A patient, shadow-wreathed ranged combatant who holds position at the edge of engagement, releasing infrequent but devastating chain-shadow bursts that leap between tightly grouped targets. True to the Stormcallers' doctrine, she never closes the gap — she lets the darkness do the crossing.

A shadow-caster who channels diffuse arcane force into piercing spikes of void-energy, each burst spreading isolation across clustered foes. Within the Stormcallers' loose doctrine, the Conduit trades lightning's speed for shadow's penetration—a ranged attrition specialist whose sparse, high-impact volleys punish grouped targets through sustained pressure rather than cascade.

A slow-building ranged striker who coils raw physical force into a single arcing release, letting chain-spread punish any cluster foolish enough to hold ground. No signal, no warning — only the delayed crack of weight crossing distance.

A slow-building ranged striker within the Chain-Strike Stormcallers who holds position at distance, gathering raw physical force before unleashing a single punishing arc that cleaves through clustered ranks. She carries no shadow in her method — only the blunt, cracking weight of a storm that breaks rather than spreads.

A patient earth-attuned striker who channels WIS-driven precision into slow-building chain bursts, letting terrain fractures and shadow-laced tremors spread damage across grouped targets from a careful distance. Within the Stormcallers' doctrine, she holds the gap longest — waiting for the earth to answer before the arc completes.

A patient wind-reader who holds position at long range, releasing slow-building gusts that detonate in sudden bursts across grouped targets — each pulse carrying both storm-charge and trailing shadow to sap and scatter. Where others in the fellowship strike in chains of lightning, this caller works the wind's delay, letting pressure accumulate before the arc finds its spread.

A mid-range INT striker who calibrates lightning output across variable strike bands, threading electrified corridors between the Corps' shadow and fire zones to deny ground recovery. Where the bombardment rotation falters, this caster surges the gap — not with brute discharge but with measured arcs that keep contested terrain live between heavier salvos.

A shadow-caster whose variable-tempo bombardment darkens contested ground in sequence with the Corps' fire and lightning cycles, using INT-scaled arcane projection to sustain wide-area coverage. Their medium-range positioning and light proxy density allow rapid repositioning between strike zones, anchoring the rotation doctrine.

A medium-range fire caster who maintains overlapping bombardment zones across contested ground, sustaining the Corps' doctrine of elemental rotation through sustained arcane volleys. Their variable-amplitude strikes feed the sequential scorching that defines Stormcaller coordination.

Where the Gale and Tide Wardens press the wide front, this fighter holds the surge line at range — reading the current's variable pull to loose water-drawn strikes that crest and collapse across the clash in rolling, INT-guided arcs. Neither fixed nor frail, the Tidecaller adjusts amplitude with each breath of the gale, flooding gaps in the assault front before the next wave of blades moves through.

kits.kit_name_canonical: Earthbound Priest of the Ruptured Vale
kits.kit_identity_narrative: A faith-caster who channels earth's resonance through deliberate, measured incantations to fracture ground beneath clustered foes, amplifying the Vanguard's shockwave doctrine through calculated bursts rather than lightning's immediacy. Their wisdom-drawn spellcraft transforms close-range chaos into overlapping tremors that deny enemy footing.

A caster-faith warrior who channels holy light through sweeping arcs of medium-tempo strikes, their variable-amplitude surges reinforcing the Wardens' wide-front assault doctrine. Where shadow fades from their ranks, radiant energy blooms—a beacon that turns the open clash into consecrated ground.
